name: The Gorilla God's Go-To Girl
original_name: ゴリラの神から加護された令嬢は王立騎士団で可愛がられる
overview: Sophia Reeler, a timid noble, received the Gorilla God’s blessing—the ultimate combat power. Now her dream of a peaceful student life is shattered as the royal knights recruit her unrivaled strength. Juggling school, the knight life, and her overwhelming power, Sophia learns the hard way that gorilla strength isn’t so simple.
